items.summary: Abivax focuses on developing therapeutics to stabilize immune response in chronic inflammatory diseases, with obefazimod as lead for ulcerative colitis.
items.evidenceLine: Develops therapeutics to stabilize immune response in chronic inflammatory diseases.
items.implication: Targeted pipeline reduces ERP execution risk.

items.summary: Leadership includes CEO Marc de Garidel, CFO Didier Blondel, CMO Fabio Cataldi, and others with pharma experience.
items.evidenceLine: Marc de Garidel CEO, Didier Blondel CFO, Fabio Cataldi CMO.
items.implication: Experienced team aids strategic ERP management.

items.summary: 2026 outlook prioritizes ABTECT-UC Phase 3 maintenance data late Q2 2026 and ENHANCE-CD Phase 2 induction data Q4 2026.
items.evidenceLine: Outlook includes ABTECT maintenance late Q2 2026 and ENHANCE-CD induction Q4 2026.

items.summary: Obefazimod Phase 3 ABTECT for UC achieved positive induction top-line results on 2025-07-22; maintenance top-line expected Q2 2026.
items.evidenceLine: Positive topline results from ABTECT induction trials.
items.implication: Positive induction data lowers ERP clinical risk for UC.

items.summary: ABTECT Phase 3 DSMB found no new safety signals on 2025-12-18, with over 80% maintenance completion.
items.evidenceLine: DSMB reported no new safety signals in maintenance trial.
items.implication: Safety confirmation reduces ERP execution risk.

items.summary: Obefazimod Phase 2b ENHANCE-CD for Crohn's enrolled first patient on 2024-10-03; 12-week induction data expected Q4 2026.
items.evidenceLine: First patient enrolled in ENHANCE-CD on October 3, 2024.

sources.title: Abivax Announces First Patient Enrolled in ENHANCE-CD

items.summary: Completion of ABTECT enrollment announced on 2025-04-29, with induction data Q3 2025 and maintenance Q2 2026.
items.evidenceLine: Enrollment completion for Phase 3 ABTECT trials.

items.summary: Abivax announced ECCO 2026 data highlighting first evidence of anti-fibrotic activity for obefazimod alongside additional clinical efficacy and safety analyses in IBD.
items.evidenceLine: IR email alert plus SEC 6-K filing (2026-02-23) confirm ECCO 2026 anti-fibrotic / efficacy / safety announcement.
items.implication: Reinforces clinical momentum and increases executive focus on readiness, controls, and ERP execution discipline ahead of upcoming milestones.

items.summary: Stock surged on M&A rumors, with speculated $15B valuation.
items.evidenceLine: Shares soar on media report of Eli Lilly bid.

sources.title: France denies contact with Eli Lilly

items.summary: Rumors of Eli Lilly �15B bid originated from La Lettre in Dec 2025; French ministry denied contact on 2026-01-12.
items.evidenceLine: Finance Ministry denies contact with Eli Lilly over Abivax deal.

sources.title: France denies contact with Eli Lilly

items.implication: Potential disruption to ERP through acquisition.
items.verificationAction: Monitor for SEC Form 6-K or AMF filings on bids.

items.summary: CEO Marc de Garidel dismissed Eli Lilly bid rumors as 'noise' on 2026-01-20, stating there was no discussion on the acquisition and declining comment on informal talks.
items.evidenceLine: The noise around this potential acquisition is a distraction, but our duty is not to be distracted.

sources.title: Abivax CEO dismisses 'noise' around rumored Eli Lilly bid

items.implication: Confirmed leadership messaging lowers rumor-driven distraction but does not prove absence of informal interest.

sections.title: Implications for ERP and Operating Model

items.summary: Monitor ABTECT maintenance data late Q2 2026 for UC approval path.
Allocate resources for ENHANCE-CD, with data Q4 2026.
Prepare contingencies for M&A amid Lilly rumors.
items.evidenceLine: CEO dismisses rumored Eli Lilly bid.

sources.title: Abivax CEO dismisses 'noise' around rumored Eli Lilly bid

items.implication: May adjust operating model for integration.

sourceBacklog.nextStep: Review cash runway in next IR release

sourceBacklog.nextStep: IR email alert confirms ECCO 2026 release headline; confirm exact release URL and abstract details when direct detector/web access is stable.

erpTriggers.whyItMattersToERP: Confirms efficacy for UC NDA filing.

Verify stock price on 2026-02-18 via Nasdaq.
Review ECCO 2026 abstracts for Abivax post-event.
Monitor French ministry statements on M&A.
